# Harshal Dasani

> Business Head at INVasset PMS & AIF (Mumbai). Markets professional and writer. CFA candidate, CA Level II cleared. Featured in 1,045+ media features across 145+ publications in 8 languages. Topics: Indian equity markets, commodities, macros, geopolitics.

## Primary pages

- [About — Harshal Dasani](https://harshald13u.github.io/harshalfeatures/): personal page with bio, stats and links to social channels.
- [Media Features Tracker](https://harshald13u.github.io/harshalfeatures/tracker/): live searchable database of every article, interview and quote across 145+ publications.
- [Markets with Harshal Blog](https://harshald13u.github.io/harshalfeatures/blog/): long-form notes on stock markets, commodities, macros, geopolitics, interviews and media features.
- [Harshal Dasani at INVasset PMS](https://harshald13u.github.io/harshalfeatures/blog/posts/harshal-dasani-invasset/): profile page for Harshal Dasani's role and market themes.
- [Harshal Dasani Interviews](https://harshald13u.github.io/harshalfeatures/blog/posts/harshal-dasani-interviews/): guide to interviews, quotes and market commentary.
- [Harshal Dasani Media Features](https://harshald13u.github.io/harshalfeatures/blog/posts/harshal-dasani-media-features/): guide to media coverage and the tracker.
- [Markets with Harshal](https://harshald13u.github.io/harshalfeatures/blog/posts/markets-with-harshal/): overview of the Markets with Harshal commentary themes.
